# Marketing Performance Dashboard

Comprehensive marketing analytics and campaign effectiveness tracking.

## Key Features

- **Marketing Funnel**: Track conversion rates across campaign stages
- **Campaign ROI**: Measure return on investment for marketing spend
- **Performance Trends**: Monitor campaign effectiveness over time

## Metrics Tracked

- Conversion rates by stage
- Cost per acquisition (CPA)
- Return on ad spend (ROAS)
- Campaign attribution

## Target Audience

- Marketing managers
- Growth teams
- Performance marketers
- Executive leadership

This dashboard enables data-driven marketing decisions and budget optimization.
